---
title: "UAV in geography"
id: material-1
order: 40
summary: "UAV in Geography - an Overview"
source_url: "https://doi.org/10.1080/00330124.2021.2000446"
modules:
  - module-introduction
Goals:
  - module-goals
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
labels:
  - basics
  - mandatory
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/introduction/material-1.md"
---

Read the article:

<https://doi.org/10.1080/00330124.2021.2000446>

## Connected Module

- [UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
